theme: Clerkenstein multi-identity — a demo stack can switch the active browser identity among the seeded heroes/orgs (the seat-switch the presenter cockpit's 'login as' drives). Replace the single DefaultDemoUser with a users/orgs Registry (ordered, keyed map of DemoUser) fed a roster JSON (RosterEntry, FAKE_FAPI_ROSTER) the demo tooling exports from the seeder's hero roster; an active-seat selection mechanism (O11 RESOLVED: parameterized FAPI handshake, server-authoritative — ?__clerk_identity=<key> on the handshake + the /v1/demo/{identities,select} control plane, NOT pure token-injection which desyncs); and a 5th Alignment DNA (clerk-multi-1, 9 genes) measuring the multi-session FAPI surface real clerk-js exhibits with single_session_mode=false. The single-identity path stays byte-identical (a one-member registry) so the existing 4 surfaces stay green. The wip/clerkenstein-browser-login branch was reconciled (its 32-line handshake note folded into architecture.md) + retired. Tooling + docs only — zero platform-repo edits.
